zh.Gatehampton, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾蓋特哈普頓
zh.Upper Heyford, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾武坡 海易福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Langetot於大約1074年出生在英國奧可福爾蓋特哈普頓時，她的父親Ralph de Langetot28歲，母親Queen Of Greece42歲。她於大約1095年與Roger de Chesney在英國奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1148年在英國奧可福爾武坡 海易福德享年75歲。

zh-hans.Gatehampton, Oxfordshire, England: 英国奧可福爾蓋特哈普頓
zh-hans.Upper Heyford, Oxfordshire, England: 英国奧可福爾武坡 海易福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Langetot于大约1074年出生在英国奧可福爾蓋特哈普頓时，她的父亲Ralph de Langetot28岁，母亲Queen Of Greece42岁。她于大约1095年与Roger de Chesney在英国奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1148年在英国奧可福爾武坡 海易福德享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Langetot was born about 1074, in Gatehampton, Oxfordshire, England, her father, Ralph de Langetot, was 28 and her mother, Queen Of Greece, was 42. She married Roger de Chesney about 1095, in Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1148, in Upper Heyford, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Langetot est née environ 1074, à Gatehampton, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Langetot, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Queen Of Greece, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Chesney environ 1095, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1148, à Upper Heyford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Langetot um 1074 in Gatehampton, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph de Langetot 28 und ihre Mutter Queen Of Greece 42. Sie hat um 1095 in Oxfordshire, England Roger de Chesney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1148 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Upper Heyford, Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Langetot è nata il circa 1074 nel Gatehampton, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, Ralph de Langetot, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Queen Of Greece, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Chesney circa 1095, nel Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1148, nel Upper Heyford, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Langetotが約1074年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアガテハンプトンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Langetotは28歳，母Queen Of Greeceは42歳であった。約1095年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでRoger de Chesneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1148年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアウップエル ヘイフォードで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Langetot(이)가 대략 1074년 영국 스퍼드실르 게이테함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Langetot(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Queen Of Greece(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 대략 1095년 영국 스퍼드실르에서 Roger de Chesney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1148년 영국 스퍼드실르 업퍼 헤이퍼드에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Langetot nasceu aproximadamente 1074, em Gatehampton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Langetot, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Queen Of Greece, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Chesney aproximadamente 1095, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1148, em Upper Heyford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Langetot родилась около 1074 г. в местности гэитэамптон, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph de Langetot было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Queen Of Greece, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Chesney около 1095 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1148 г. в местности уппир хифорд, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Langetot nació aproximadamente 1074, en Gatehampton, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Langetot, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Queen Of Greece, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Roger de Chesney aproximadamente 1095, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1148, en Upper Heyford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
